subcodes.first_line: Say: O Pen! When the appointed time came, the eyes were bewildered and the breezes of that moment seized the ungodly, among whom were those who cast away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا قلم اذا جاء الحین حارت العین و اخذت المشرکین نفحات الحین منهم من نبذ
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of the Manifestation of God
